description_long: This is a medium-sized residential house with a prominent gable roof and a combination of brick and siding exterior. The house features a front porch with white railings and steps leading up to the main entrance, which is centrally located. Multiple windows are arranged symmetrically on the front facade, including two dormer windows on the upper story. The roof is covered with reddish-brown shingles, and there is a chimney visible near the center. The property is surrounded by several large leafy trees and a detached garage or outbuilding with a matching roof. The landscaping includes a paved walkway and a small patch of greenery near the entrance.
description: A two-story house with a gable roof, brick and siding exterior, front porch, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by trees and a detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with white railings, and symmetrical dormer windows above.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side of the house, the detached garage, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the garage, and more of the surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the gable end, the garage, and the dense foliage of the nearest tree.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch, white railings, and decorative columns.
